visual-anti-patterns.notes: Gradient orbs/blobs floating on the landing page (yellow circle, pink square, purple circle, green square); feature card body text on landing page appears smaller than 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable emoji-labeled objects, playful tone in AI buddy, calm pastel palette, minimal text density; sidebar items could be slightly larger

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent type ramp, card radii, and color palette across pages; minor drift in button accent colors between builder (green Save) and landing/gallery (coral primary)

visual-accessibility.notes: Good dark-on-light text contrast on most surfaces and text labels on nearly all buttons; no visible focus rings anywhere, no responsive/narrow-width evidence, and some light-colored button text (Open, suggestion chips) with questionable contrast
